children.text: causation of congenital heart disease, including genetic causes;
long-term outcomes in individuals with congenital heart disease, including infants, children, teenagers, adults, and elderly individuals;
studies using longitudinal data and retrospective analysis to identify effective treatments and outcomes for individuals with congenital heart disease; and
identifying barriers to life-long care for individuals with congenital heart disease.

children.heading: Coordination of research activities
children.label: b Coordination of research activities
children.text: The Director of the Institute may coordinate research efforts related to congenital heart disease among multiple research institutions and may develop research networks.

children.heading: Minority and medically underserved communities
children.label: c Minority and medically underserved communities
children.text: In carrying out the activities described in this section, the Director of the Institute shall consider the application of such research and other activities to minority and medically underserved communities.
